title: Entity
description: Base meta-class for every node (vertex) in the Agent-Fabric graph. All concrete node kinds extend this schema. Entities are bitemporal, versioned, and provenance-bearing.

iri.description: Stable identifier for a graph element, expressed as an IRI/URN (e.g. 'af:agent/orchestrator-7' or 'urn:agennext:agent:orchestrator-7').

provenance.description: Where an assertion came from and how much to trust it.

source.description: System or connector that asserted this element (e.g. 'agent-platform', 'agent-identity', 'discovery-scan').

assertedBy.description: Identity of the agent/human/service that asserted this element.

evidence.description: Trace nodes (af:Trace) that substantiate this assertion.

confidence.description: Asserter confidence in [0,1]. Absence implies an authoritative (1.0) assertion.

id.description: Globally unique, stable IRI for this entity.

kind.description: Node kind. Must be a kind registered in the type registry.

attributes.description: Kind-specific, extensible key/value attributes. Concrete node schemas constrain this object.

scope.description: Workspace (af:Workspace) this entity is scoped to. Establishes the workspace topology partition.

tenant.description: Tenant / organization boundary the entity belongs to.

version.description: Semantic or monotonic version of the entity's definition.

revision.description: Monotonic transaction revision counter, incremented on every committed change.

validFrom.description: Valid-time start: when this fact became true in the modeled world.

validTo.description: Valid-time end: when this fact ceased to be true. Open-ended (current) if omitted.

observedAt.description: Real-time signal: when this entity was last observed/refreshed by the fabric.

createdAt.description: Transaction-time: when the record was first written.

updatedAt.description: Transaction-time: when the record was last written.
